display_text: Defiant Shell, Tier 2: Neutral item providing Reciprocity passive. When the holder is attacked, they counter-attack a target within their attack range for 80% of their regular attack damage. Enables retaliatory damage during skirmishes and trades. Stats: Counter Damage: 80%, Cooldown: 5s.
